thought.text: It seems there are no README files in the project directory structure. Let me check if there's a GitHub repository URL where we can find more information about this project.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "grep -r \"github\" /workspace/project", "is_input": "false", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Search for GitHub references in the project files"}

summary: Search for GitHub references in the project files
